ogTitle: Binna Burra vs Binya: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Binna Burra and Binya.
heading: Binna Burra vs Binya — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Binna Burra, New South Wales and Binya, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Binna Burra has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Binya (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Binna Burra or Binya safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Binna Burra has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Binya scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Binna Burra scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Binya scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Binna Burra or Binya?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Binna Burra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
